GRPPROP: ShipmentId; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION15(ID: UNKNOWN15; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintHeaderOnAllPagesVar) <> "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentId; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION16(ID: UNKNOWN16; VALUE: 6; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintHeaderOnAllPagesVar) <> "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentId; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION17(ID: UNKNOWN17; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentId) REGION18(ID: UNKNOWN18; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintHeaderOnAllPagesVar) <> "1"; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: PackageId; RPTNP: True) REGION21(ID: UNKNOWN43; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: CoNum; RPTNP: True) REGION22(ID: UNKNOWN21; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentLine) REGION23(ID: UNKNOWN22; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentLine; GROW: True) REGION24(ID: UNKNOWN23; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintDescriptionVar) = "1" & #P(ItemDesc) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentLine; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION25(ID: UNKNOWN47; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(CustItem) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentLine; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION26(ID: UNKNOWN24; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintEUDetailsVar) = "1" & #P(EcCode) <> "" & #P(Origin) <> "" & #P(CommCode) = ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: ShipmentLineSeq; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION27(ID: UNKNOWN25; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintDeliveryIncoTermsVar) = "1" & #P(Delterm) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Item; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION28(ID: UNKNOWN26; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayShipmentSeqNotes) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Item; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(ShipSeqRowpointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION29(ID: UNKNOWN27; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintLotNumbersVar) = "1" & #P(Lot) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Lot; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION30(ID: UNKNOWN50; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(CustLot) <> "" & #GV(IsCSIB_71568ActiveVar) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: CustLot; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION31(ID: UNKNOWN28; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(SerialNum) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: SerialNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION32(ID: UNKNOWN49; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(CustSerNum) <> "" & #GV(IsCSIB_68758ActiveVar) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: CustSerNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION33(ID: UNKNOWN29; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintKitComponents) = "1" & #P(CompItem) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: SerialNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION34(ID: UNKNOWN30; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintKitComponents) = "1" & #P(CompItem) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION35(ID: UNKNOWN31; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintKitComponents) = "1" & #P(CompItem) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION36(ID: UNKNOWN44; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: SerialNum) REGION37(ID: UNKNOWN45; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: Lot) REGION38(ID: UNKNOWN46; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: Item) REGION39(ID: UNKNOWN32; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ShipmentLine) REGION40(ID: UNKNOWN33; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: CoNum) REGION41(ID: UNKNOWN34; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: PackageId) REGION42(ID: UNKNOWN35; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayShipmentPackageNotes) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: PackageId; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(ShipPackageRowpointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION43(ID: UNKNOWN36; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PageBetweenPackagesVar) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: PackageId; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION44(ID: UNKNOWN37; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayShipmentNotes) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ShipmentId; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(ShipRowpointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternalNotes), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternalNotes)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION45(ID: UNKNOWN38; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintCertificateOfConformanceVar) = "1" & #P(CertificateOfConformanceText) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ShipmentId; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION46(ID: UNKNOWN39; VALUE: 6; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintCertificateOfConformanceVar) = "1" & #P(CertificateOfConformanceText) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ShipmentId; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION47(ID: UNKNOWN48; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: ShipmentIdPackageIdDesc; BRKAFT: True) REGION48(ID: UNKNOWN40; VALUE: 2.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) REGION49(ID: UNKNOWN41; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) REGION50(ID: UNKNOWN42; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: NavigationFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PageHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 12; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: ReportHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,1,0) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 10fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0.25,0) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 10fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0.25,0) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(PrintBlankPickupDate), VAR V(IncludeSerialNumbers), VAR V(DisplayShipmentNotes), VAR V(DisplayShipmentSeqNotes), VAR V(DisplayShipmentPackageNotes), VAR V(SubShipmentStarting), VAR V(SubShipmentEnding), VAR V(CustomerStarting), VAR V(CustomerEnding), VAR V(ShipToStarting), VAR V(ShipToEnding), VAR V(PickupDateStartingOffset), VAR V(PickupDateEndingOffset), VAR V(DateNullVar), VAR V(DateNullVar), VAR V(PrintInternalNotes), VAR V(PrintExternalNotes), VAR V(DisplayHeader), VAR V(pSite),
Variable.Value2: VAR V(PrintDescriptionVar), VAR V(PrintHeaderOnAllPagesVar), VAR V(PageBetweenPackagesVar), VAR V(PrintCertificateOfConformanceVar), VAR V(PrintPackageWeightVar), VAR V(PrintDeliveryIncoTermsVar), VAR V(PrintEUDetailsVar), VAR V(PrintKitComponents),)

Variable.Name: fds2_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS2( VAR V(PrintLotNumbersVar), VAR V(IncludeCustSerialNumbers), VAR V(PrintCustomerLotNumbersVar))
